title: Duplicate Id/UTCDate type aliases in types:: and jmap::
description: types::Id and jmap::Id are both pub type Id = String, and same for UTCDate. The two modules are both pub, so callers see two non-interchangeable names for the same type. Code in methods.rs uses crate::types::Chat but returns GetResponse<T> whose fields are plain String, not typed. A contributor adding a helper that takes a types::Id will be confused about which Id to use, and any future newtype wrapping of one but not the other will silently break cross-module use. — Fossilizes wrong: whichever alias gets used first in downstream code becomes the canonical one.
